mapper.select:
select count(*) from department
name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
select id, name, description, status from department
select id, name, description, status from department where id = #{id}
select id, name, description, status from department where name = #{name}
select id, name, description, status from department where name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
mapper.insert: insert into department (name, description, status) values (#{name}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.select: select count(*) > 0 from department where id = #{id}
select count(*) > 0 from department where name = #{name}
